company_profile.description: "Kathuria offers leading-edge, rolling mill and metal processing solutions. We are ISO 9001:2015 certified and help set up, run and optimize mills through our products and engineering services, to deliver end to end solutions to some of the biggest challenges in the rolling mill domain today. Pan Indian in presence and global in nature, Kathuria innovates to add value through its collective expertise and commitment to quality."

catalog_items.description: The TMT Quenching System is a specialized industrial equipment designed for the thermo-mechanical treatment of steel products, ensuring optimal metallurgical properties. Pricing for this advanced system is available upon request, tailored to specific project requirements. It is ideal for procurement managers and plant operators in steel manufacturing and metal processing facilities seeking efficient and reliable quenching solutions. This system is engineered to meet rigorous industry standards, contributing to the production of high-quality TMT steel.

catalog_items.description: Kathuria's Housingless Mill Stand is a robust industrial solution for hot steel rolling mills, designed for high performance, precision, and a long service life. It ensures superior mill stability, enhanced productivity, and consistent output in steel production.

social_source.caption:
Kathuria successfully delivers and commissions its latest Housingless Mill Stand project in West Bengal (India), reinforcing its leadership in hot steel rolling mill solutions. Designed for high performance, precision, and long service life, Kathuria’s housingless stands ensure superior mill stability, productivity, and consistent output.

With over four decades of expertise, Kathuria continues to support the steel industry with reliable engineering, robust manufacturing, and strong after-sales service.

social_source.caption:
Experience the execution of a Kathuria engineering project through this detailed time-lapse video. From groundwork and structural assembly to precision installation, this project reflects Kathuria’s expertise in delivering reliable, high-performance solutions for the steel rolling mill industry.

With decades of experience in engineering, manufacturing, and project execution, Kathuria specializes in complete solutions for hot steel rolling mills—covering design, equipment supply, installation, and after-sales support. This time-lapse highlights the discipline, planning, and technical excellence that go into every Kathuria project.

If you are planning a new steel rolling mill or upgrading an existing setup, Kathuria offers proven engineering solutions built for performance, durability, and long-term value.

Visit us at https://www.kathuriarollmill.com/

Manufactured with industrial-grade components, this cooling bed ensures reliable performance and durability in demanding environments.

posts.caption:
'kathuria' Hydraulic Billet Shear used for cutting of Cold Billets for various sizes and lengths.

The machine is available with the capacity of 800 Ton, 1000 Ton & 1200 Ton. The machine has been designed to cut the Billets size up to 160 mm.

Kathuria successfully delivers and commissions its latest Housingless Mill Stand project in West Bengal (India), reinforcing its leadership in hot steel rolling mill solutions. Designed for high performance, precision, and long service life, Kathuria’s housingless stands ensure superior mill stability, productivity, and consistent output.

With over four decades of expertise, Kathuria continues to support the steel industry with reliable engineering, robust manufacturing, and strong after-sales service.

Kathuria proudly participated as a Sponsor at AIIFA 2025, reaffirming its long-standing commitment to the growth and advancement of India’s steel industry. The event brought together key stakeholders, industry leaders, and technology providers to exchange insights on innovation, sustainability, and the future of steel manufacturing.

Through its presence at AIIFA 2025, Kathuria showcased its engineering capabilities and comprehensive solutions for the steel rolling mill sector—backed by decades of experience in design, manufacturing, project execution, and after-sales support.

Our participation as a sponsor reflects Kathuria’s continued dedication to supporting industry platforms that drive collaboration, knowledge sharing, and technological progress within the steel ecosystem.

'kathuria' AUTOMATIC SECTION STACKER (Magnetic) used to handle straight and reverse layers of Angles, Channel, Beams etc. with production capacity of ≤ 120 T/Hr.

Handling of Straight and reverse layer can be mechanical or magnetic with high speed stacking. Automatic binding of the packages and stacks is available with wire tying or strapping.

All stacks can be automatically weighed and further labelled for quality assured delivery of finished products.
